title: Practice Session Next Learning Unit Preview
goal: Expose the immediate next non-empty step group as a compact preview on /practice/session/:sessionId using pure sessionView helpers and existing bundle data, without changing practice runtime/store persistence or sim/admin boundaries.
constraints: Keep src/stores/practiceStore.ts, src/lib/practice/runtime.ts, src/lib/practice/queries.ts, src/types/practice.ts, router, sim pages, and admin flows unchanged unless a blocker is proven from code
Derive current/next step-group sequence from engineState.node_progress plus bundle.step_groups and bundle.step_group_nodes; do not infer next preview from legalActions only
Keep next preview session-local and pure; do not promote current/next learning-unit state into Zustand or persistence for this task
Scope the preview to step metadata and text tacit only; exclude tacit media preview, modal/gallery/player work, signed URL handling, PracticeMenuPage tacit preview, and debug console expansion
No any, as any, ts-ignore, eslint-disable, admin/game cross-import, display:none, or inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors
Reuse existing gameVariables tokens first and avoid touching src/styles/gameVariables.css unless a missing token is proven from code
No extra changes outside the approved write set and the session-start dirty snapshot baseline
acceptance: A pure helper can derive the immediate next non-empty step group after the current incomplete group using existing bundle plus progress data
The helper returns stable next-group title, summary, primary location label, and sorted text tacit preview data without React, Zustand, or Supabase imports
PracticeSessionPage shows a compact next learning-unit preview when a next group exists and hides it cleanly when the current group is last or the session is complete
Existing current tacit media panel, legal action buttons, ghost guide wording/intensity, session lifecycle, and persistence behavior remain unchanged
PracticeMenuPage, PracticeAdminPage, runtime/store derived state, queries/types, sim routes/pages, and signed/private media handling remain unchanged

npx vitest run src/lib/practice/__tests__/sessionView.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, and npm run lint complete with no new warnings/errors beyond the pre-existing warning at src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 and the pre-existing non-blocking Vite chunk warning
